title: How Do You Make AI Apps Secure, Auditable, and Reliable?
pageTitle: How Do You Make AI Apps Secure, Auditable, and Reliable? — Last Rev
description: Security, auditability, and reliability aren't features you bolt on later. Here's a practical guide to building AI applications that enterprises can actually trust — with frameworks from NIST, OWASP, and Gartner.
author: Last Rev Team
